description: Source registry for agent data collection. Each source is scored for quality and mapped to the agents that consume it.

sources.label: European Central Bank Exchange Rates
sources.reliability: Official ECB reference rates, updated daily on business days.
sources.notes: Primary source for EUR/USD rates. Use XML feed for automation.
refinementSuggestions: Add ECB SDMX API endpoint for programmatic access
Track 90-day rolling average for optimistic/pessimistic range

sources.label: Zillow Rental Listings
sources.reliability: Largest US real estate platform. Rental Zestimates updated weekly.
sources.notes: Use for 2BR house rental comps in all 9 US locations. Filter by house/townhouse, 2+ bedrooms.
refinementSuggestions: Cross-reference with Redfin for price accuracy
Track Zillow Observed Rent Index (ZORI) for trend data

sources.label: Rentometer
sources.reliability: Aggregates rental data from multiple listing services. Strong for US metro areas.
sources.notes: Good cross-check against Zillow. Provides median and percentile ranges.
refinementSuggestions: Use for validation rather than primary data
Check if API access is available for automation

sources.label: SeLoger (France Housing)
sources.reliability: Largest French real estate portal. Comprehensive rental listings.
sources.notes: Primary source for 4 French locations. Search for 'maison T3' (2BR house). Prices in EUR.
refinementSuggestions: Add LeBonCoin as secondary French source
Track charges/fees separately from base rent

sources.label: Idealista (Spain & Portugal Housing)
sources.reliability: Dominant marketplace in Iberian peninsula. Extensive rental inventory.
sources.notes: Use for Alicante and Lisbon/Algarve. Search 2-bedroom houses. Prices in EUR.
refinementSuggestions: Add Fotocasa as secondary Spain source
Track seasonal rental price variation for coastal areas

sources.label: IRS (US Federal Tax)
sources.reliability: Official federal tax brackets, standard deductions, and filing thresholds.
sources.notes: Update annually when inflation adjustments are published. Also check Publication 915 for SS taxation thresholds.
refinementSuggestions: Add state revenue department URLs for each US location
Track provisional income thresholds for SS taxation

sources.label: Medicare.gov
sources.reliability: Official Medicare plan finder. Part D formulary pricing, Advantage plan comparison.
sources.notes: Use Plan Finder for Part D drug costs by ZIP. Check IRMAA brackets for higher-income surcharges.
refinementSuggestions: Add GoodRx for non-Medicare drug price cross-checks
Track Part B premium increases separately

sources.label: T-Mobile 55+ Plans
sources.reliability: Direct carrier pricing. 55+ plans are age-verified, publicly listed.
sources.notes: Primary US cell plan. 2 lines with taxes/fees included. Check for autopay discount.
refinementSuggestions: Add Mint Mobile as budget alternative comparison
Track international roaming add-on costs for non-US locations

sources.label: Social Security Administration
sources.reliability: Official benefit calculators, COLA announcements, trust fund projections.
sources.notes: Track COLA announcements, FRA tables, spousal benefit rules, and trust fund depletion projections.
refinementSuggestions: Monitor CBO alternative depletion date estimates
Add breakeven analysis calculator for early vs delayed filing

sources.label: Ameli.fr (French National Health Insurance)
sources.reliability: Official French social security reimbursement rates and formulary.
sources.notes: Primary source for French healthcare costs. Check PUMA eligibility for retirees and mutuelle (complementary insurance) requirements.
refinementSuggestions: Add mutuelle comparison sites (LeLynx, Assurland) for top-up costs
Track ticket moderateur rates by care category

sources.label: Numbeo Cost of Living
sources.reliability: Large crowdsourced dataset. Good for relative comparisons, less precise for absolute values.
sources.notes: Use as cross-check only, not primary source. Sample sizes vary by city. Good for spotting outlier values in primary data.
refinementSuggestions: Weight by contributor count per city
Flag cities with fewer than 50 contributors

sources.label: Expatistan Cost of Living
sources.reliability: Smaller crowdsourced dataset than Numbeo. Useful for expat-specific cost perspective.
sources.notes: Secondary cross-check. Expat-oriented pricing may skew higher than local averages.
refinementSuggestions: Compare item-level prices against Numbeo for consistency
Note where Expatistan and Numbeo diverge significantly

sources.label: Bureau of Labor Statistics CPI
sources.reliability: Official US inflation data. CPI-U and CPI-W published monthly.
sources.notes: Use CPI category breakdowns to validate per-category inflation assumptions in COST_CATEGORIES. CPI-E (elderly) tracks closer to retiree spending.
refinementSuggestions: Add regional CPI data for metro-area-specific inflation
Track CPI-E (experimental elderly index) for retiree-specific rates

sources.label: Encuentra24 (Panama Housing)
sources.reliability: Largest Panama classifieds site. Rental inventory varies; Boquete has smaller sample sizes.
sources.notes: Primary source for Panama City and Boquete housing. Prices in USD. Filter for 2+ recamaras (bedrooms).
refinementSuggestions: Add Compreoalquile.com as secondary Panama source
Track furnished vs unfurnished to ensure consistent comparison

sources.label: Ile-de-France Mobilites / Local Transit
sources.reliability: Official French regional transit pricing. Each city has its own transit authority.
sources.updateLag: Annual (fare changes in January or September)
sources.notes: Use each city's local transit authority: TBM (Bordeaux area for Brittany comparisons), TCL (Lyon), TaM (Montpellier), Tisseo (Toulouse). Check senior/retiree discount tariffs.
refinementSuggestions: Add TRAM Alicante and Carris/Metro Lisboa for Iberian transit
Track monthly pass vs pay-per-ride breakeven for retiree usage patterns

sources.label: SNS Portugal (National Health Service)
sources.reliability: Official Portuguese health service. Covers taxas moderadoras (co-pays) and pharmacy pricing.
sources.notes: Portugal SNS covers residents. Check NHR/IFICI status for tax-linked healthcare access. Pharmacy prices regulated by INFARMED.
refinementSuggestions: Add INFARMED drug price database for prescription costs
Track private health insurance quotes for expats not yet in SNS

sources.label: Spanish Social Security Healthcare
sources.reliability: Official Spanish social security system. Covers public healthcare access for residents.
sources.notes: Spain requires convenio especial for non-working residents. Check monthly premium and co-pay rates for Alicante.
refinementSuggestions: Add private insurer quotes (Sanitas, Adeslas) as expat alternative
Track convenio especial premium adjustments

sources.label: French Tax Authority (impots.gouv.fr)
sources.reliability: Official French income tax brackets, social charges (CSG/CRDS), and treaty provisions.
sources.updateLag: Annual (brackets published in Loi de Finances)
sources.notes: Check US-France tax treaty for pension taxation. Track CSG/CRDS rates on investment income for S1 form holders.
refinementSuggestions: Add simulateur.impots.gouv.fr for scenario testing
Track taxe fonciere and taxe d'habitation for housing agent
